name: Mock Egg Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely mash the chick peas.
2. Combine the mashed chick peas with the dressing and other ingredients.
3. Mix until well blended. A food processor can be used, but a coarse texture is more like traditional egg salad.
4. Serve stuffed in a tomato on a lettuce leaf, or open-faced on whole wheat toast, garnished with cucumber slices.
(ER Note: Try making one or two servings at a time and freeze extra chick peas in meal-sized amounts.)
